expectations.evidence: Output starts with 'MEMORANDUM FOR Brigade Commander', 'FROM: Col. Harris...', 'DATE: 28 May 2026', 'SUBJECT: Approve Dual-Track Action...'
BLUF reads: '...requiring immediate approval of an emergency resupply request and a FRAGO to reduce vehicle idle time.'
Recommendation 4a: 'decision required NLT COB 28 May 2026 to meet the 72-hour lead time'
Output opens directly with 'MEMORANDUM FOR' — no meta-commentary
